questions.question: As of March 14, 2024, which of the following is Asia's longest tunnel?
Which Indian football club won the 2025 Kalinga Super Cup?
In May 2025, which Indian organisation successfully completed the 'Har Shikhar Tiranga' mission by summiting Mt. Kangchenjunga?
questions.option_4: National Institute of Mountaineering and Adventure Sports

questions.question: Who became the first Indian driver to win a Formula 2 race in May 2025?
Who among the following bagged India’s first gold medal at International Shooting Sport Federation (ISSF) Junior World Cup, Germany in May 2025?
Which two countries signed an agreement on 22 May 2025, regarding the future of the Chagos Archipelago?
questions.option_1: United Kingdom and Republic of Mauritius
questions.option_2: United States and Republic of Mauritius

questions.question: Which of the following organisations in India developed the world’s highest-resolution weather forecasting model in May 2025?
questions.option_1: National Centre for Medium Range Weather Forecasting (NCMRWF)

questions.question: Who became the first artist to win Best Male Act three times at the 2025 MOBO Awards?
Which organisation introduced new guidelines in 2025 to regulate the sale of radio equipment, including walkie-talkies, on e-commerce platforms?
questions.option_3: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology (MeitY)

questions.question: The Central Government approved the allocation of additional how many million tonnes of rice from the Food Corporation of India (FCI) for ethanol production in May 2025?
What is the primary purpose of the Raksha Kavach system showcased by the Defence Research and Development Organisation (DRDO) on Republic Day, 2025?
As per the Scheduled Castes (Rationalisation of Reservation) Act, 2025 implemented by Telangana government, what percentage of reservation will Group II get within the 15 percent quota for SC?
What is the codename of the Low-Level Transportable Radar (LLTR) to be procured by the Ministry of Defence (MoD) with Bharat Electronics Limited (BEL) at a cost of ₹2,906 crore in March 2025?
As per the PIB report published on 17 April 2025, India's defence production has reached a new milestone by increasing from ₹40,000 crore in 2014 to over how much in the financial year 2023-24?
Recipient of Padma Bhushan in 2025, Shri Pankaj R Patel was the Chairman of which of the following pharmaceutical companies of India in April 2025?
Which ISRO mission, successfully completed in January 2025, demonstrated autonomous docking between two satellites?
In news in 2025, which state announced plans to create India’s first Quantum Computing Village?
The 'Connect India 2025' event organised by an Indian association in the USA called IAM, aimed to bring together partner organisations from which region?

Which convention, ratified in 1998, attempts to safeguard the environment and human health by encouraging shared accountability and collaboration in the global trade of pesticides and hazardous chemicals?
India’s renewable energy sector saw a record-breaking addition of 24.5 GW and 3.4 GW through which of the following in 2024, as per the Ministry of New and Renewable Energy data?
In the 2025 World Aquatics World Cup, which team did the Greece women's team defeat to win the gold medal for the first time?
As a tribute to 1857 hero Babu Kunwar Singh, the IAF Surya Kiran air show in April 2025 dazzled the skies of _________.
Which of the following Indian brands has secured the second position in the Future Brand Index, 2024?
Which summit held in Kochi in February 2025 aimed to attract investments across various sectors in Kerala?
What is a key feature of the Waqf (Amendment) Act, 2025?
questions.option_1: Inclusion of Muslim women and all sects in boards
questions.option_2: Implementation of uniform civil code guidelines
questions.option_3: Abolition of all existing Waqf Boards
questions.option_4: Nationalisation of all registered Waqf properties
